title: paper_spine record
description: Upsert the persistent paper-spine pointer row carried across outline -> write -> review -> finalize. The rich TYPED spine content lives in the spine_ref artifact (runs/<q>/paper/spine.json) and is validated by `outline validate` against the spine content schema. submission_ready is NOT a property here (additionalProperties:false) and is force-reset to 0 on every upsert; only `manuscript coverage` computes it. The finalize coverage gate reads the computed flag, never artifact existence.

spine_ref.description: loop-relative path to the typed spine.json artifact
